== Notes for [[Item:Q80285|Q80285]] ==

ID: I86645

Name: Flavius Numerius

Given Name: Flavius

Surname: Numerius

Sex: M

_UID: F3BD0D739338D44B903D95B5613193AB0121

Change Date: 18 Oct 2005

Death: deceased

Marriage 1 Claudia Appelinius b: ABT 200

Married:

Children

Flavius Crispus b: ABT 230

Claudius II Gothicus b: 10 MAY 214

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I86645

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
